# Contributing to ReskFlow

Thank you for your interest in contributing to ReskFlow!

## Commit Message Guidelines

Please follow these conventions for commit messages:

- Use the format: `<type>: <subject>`
- Types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, test, chore
- Write in imperative mood, lowercase, no period at end
- DO NOT add Co-Authored-By lines
- All commits should be attributed to the repository owner

## Development Setup

1. Clone the repository
2. Install dependencies: `npm install`
3. Set up environment variables
4. Run development servers

## Code Standards

- Follow TypeScript best practices
- Maintain test coverage
- Document new features
- Follow existing code style
